channel.title: Posts on Byron Hawksmith | Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Byron Hawksmith | Blog

item.title: Taming Azure AD B2C - Part One
item.description: Learn how to configure and deploy an ASP.NET MVC web application and leverage Azure AD B2C for your customer identity and access management needs.

item.title: Automating Windows 10 Developer Environment Setup
item.description: Learn how to automate setting up your Windows 10 developer environment.
